info.title: Blueprint Robot-Team Agent API
info.summary: Headless catalog, site-world, dry-run commerce, hosted-session, explorer-render, and export contract for robot-team agents.
info.description: Blueprint exposes capture-backed site-world catalog, dry-run quote/order/entitlement proof, and hosted-session endpoints for robot-team agents. Public demo calls may run without privileged credentials only when a demo site world is enabled. Protected robot-team flows use the existing Firebase bearer path and require robot_team/admin outer auth plus session ownership or a matching provisioned entitlement.

servers.description: Production public origin. Protected flows require a scoped robot-team/admin bearer token.
Local development server. Public demo flow can run without auth when demo site worlds are enabled.

tags.name: Discovery
tags.description: Public site and API discovery for agents.

tags.name: Catalog
tags.description: Public site-world catalog and detail endpoints.

tags.name: Agent commerce
tags.description: Dry-run quote, order, receipt, and entitlement proof. Does not call live Stripe.

tags.name: Hosted sessions
tags.description: Session lifecycle, rollout, render, and export endpoints.

get.summary: Discover public Blueprint pages, llms files, and machine-readable resources.
Search public site-world catalog entries by natural language query, alias, and structured filters.
get.description: Public read-only catalog discovery for robot-team agents. Queries such as whole foods, store, supermarket, retail aisle, or warehouse tote return truthful close matches with scores, reasons, matched aliases, matched fields, parsed filters, warnings, and embedding-use metadata. Brand aliases do not imply exact partner or package availability.

parameters.name: objectTags
parameters.description: Comma-separated required object tags, for example tote,pallet.

get.x-blueprint-truth-boundary: This endpoint is public catalog discovery only. It does not grant hosted-session access, buyer entitlement, private artifact access, or exact brand/site availability.

get.summary: Get one public site-world detail record.

404.description: Requested site world or session was not found

403.description: Authenticated account is not allowed to launch protected hosted sessions

409.description: Launch or runtime operation is blocked by current readiness, access, or session state

get.summary: Quote a site-world package or hosted-session rental for agent planning.
get.x-blueprint-truth-boundary: Quotes are planning artifacts. They do not create live Stripe sessions, charge cards, grant live package access, or prove rights clearance.

post.summary: Create a dry-run order and provisioned entitlement without live Stripe.
post.x-blueprint-truth-boundary: This route reuses buyerOrders and marketplaceEntitlements response shapes for local/test proof only. It never calls live Stripe or opens live package access.

get.summary: Read a dry-run order and receipt.

404.description: Requested site world or session was not found
Requested site world or session was not found

get.summary: Check whether a provisioned entitlement would unlock protected hosted-session launch.
get.x-blueprint-truth-boundary: Entitlement readiness proves commerce linkage only. Runtime launch, rights, provider execution, and package fulfillment still require their owning systems.

BlueprintBearer.bearerFormat: Firebase ID token or future scoped robot-team machine token
BlueprintBearer.description: Protected flows currently use Firebase Admin token verification. The bearer must resolve to an admin user or a user profile with buyerType robot_team.

unsafe_allow_blocked_site_world.description: Internal/local escape hatch only. Do not use for public or protected production flows.
